title: Skill Definitions
description: Defines the skills that pawns can learn and improve. Each skill has an XP curve controlled by xpBase and xpGrowth: XP for level N = xpBase * xpGrowth^(N-1).

nameKey.description: i18n key for the display name.

xpBase.description: XP required to reach level 1. Higher levels multiply this by xpGrowth.

xpGrowth.description: Multiplier applied per level for the XP curve. Must be greater than 1.0 or XP requirements stay flat across levels.
